scripts.check:bundle: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const path=require('node:path');const dir=path.join(process.cwd(),'dist','assets');const files=fs.readdirSync(dir).filter((name)=>name.endsWith('.js'));if(files.length===0){throw new Error('No built JS assets found in dist/assets')}for(const file of files){require('node:child_process').execFileSync(process.execPath,['--check',path.join(dir,file)],{stdio:'inherit'})}"
scripts.lint: eslint src playground vite.config.ts vite.playground.config.ts vitest.config.ts playwright.config.ts eslint.config.js
